src: This code accompanies the the paper Slow Momentum with Fast Reversion: A Trading Strategy Using Deep Learning and Changepoint Detection (https://arxiv.org/pdf/2105.13727.pdf).
ja: 論文「Slow Momentum with Fast Reversion: A Trading Strategy Using Deep Learning and Changepoint Detection」（https://arxiv.org/pdf/2105.13727.pdf）に付随するコード。
